name: ❓ Question / Help
about: "Not a bug, just a question. (Consider Discussions first for open-ended topics.)"
title: 'q: '
labels: ['question']
assignees: []
---

<!--
  Before filing:
  - "How do I do X?" / "Why does it work like Y?" → GitHub Discussions is a
    better home for these. Issues are tracked as TODO for maintainers;
    Discussions are more conversational and searchable by future users.
  - Something's clearly broken → please use the Bug report template instead.
  - You hit a security issue → do NOT file it here. See SECURITY.md.
-->

### What are you trying to do

<!-- The outcome you want, not just the command that's not working. -->

### What you've tried

<!-- Commands, configs, links to docs you read. Helps us skip suggesting things
     you already did. -->

- OS:
- Node version:
- think-prompt version:
